title: Korean-Style Stir Fried Beef with Dates
description: A sweet and savory stir fry made with marinated beef, fermented Korean chili flakes, and caramelized dates.
instructions: Heat the cooking oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the beef to the skillet and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes. Remove the beef from the skillet and set aside.
Add the sliced dates to the skillet and cook until caramelized, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the light soy sauce and fermented Korean chili flakes to the skillet and stir to combine.
Return the beef to the skillet and stir to combine with the soy sauce and chili flakes.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the beef is cooked to your desired level of doneness.
Serve the Korean-Style Stir Fried Beef with Dates hot, garnished with sliced green onions and toasted sesame seeds if desired.
